subcodes.title: Words to some Baha'is, spoken on 1913-12-09
subcodes.first_line: As long as a person is not separated from the sacred surroundings of the Threshold of Bahá'u'lláh, he does not realize the magnitude of his loss
subcodes.subjects: @presence of; reunion with God, @Shrines and Holy places, @two kinds of civilization; material and spiritual civilization
